filesystem.comment: File read/write sandboxed to MCP_FS_ROOT (defaults to project root via process.cwd()). Write tools policy-gated to pro.

fetch.comment: Fetch any URL and return its content. No API key needed.

memory.comment: Persistent knowledge graph for semantic memory. No API key needed. Complements/replaces Pinecone.

sequential-thinking.comment: Structured multi-step reasoning before acting. No API key needed. Improves complex task quality.

search.comment: Brave Search web search. Requires BRAVE_API_KEY from brave.com/search/api (free tier available).

github.comment: GitHub read/write. Requires GITHUB_TOKEN with repo+issues scope. Write tools policy-gated.

playwright.comment: Real browser automation — browse, click, screenshot. Requires browser binaries (large, ~300MB). Enable only on non-free Render plans: set PLAYWRIGHT_BROWSERS_PATH=/opt/render/project/src/.playwright

gcal.comment: Google Calendar read/write. Requires OAuth2 setup: GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID, GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET, GOOGLE_REFRESH_TOKEN. Run 'npx @modelcontextprotocol/server-google-calendar auth' locally first.

supabase.comment: Supabase DB access (read-only). Requires SUPABASE_ACCESS_TOKEN — project management token from supabase.com/dashboard/account/tokens (different from SUPABASE_KEY).
